title: dendrorkis jussieuana
intro: Dendrocnide jussieuana, also known as giant sensitive plant, is a species of flowering plant in the nettle family, Urticaceae. It is native to Australia and is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The leaves of the plant have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, with potential health benefits including reduced inflammation and improved immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, the leaves are often prepared as a decoction or infusion, which can be used to make teas, salves, or other preparations.
